questions.question: Which mission by the Indian Government, launched in 2023, aims to develop quantum technologies and has established four Thematic Hubs across premier institutions, as of 2025?
Which ministry has introduced a technology-driven initiative called e-Zero FIR on 19 May 2025 to boost India's cybercrime-fighting capabilities?
questions.option_4: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

questions.question: Which of the following organisations conducted the CROPS experiment to study plant growth in space in February 2025?
Which organisation has released the India Justice Report (IJR) in April 2025?
In how many cities of Bihar were the Khelo India Youth Games 2025 held?
Who laid the foundation stone of the Bageshwar Dham Medical and Science Research Institute in Madhya Pradesh?
Which district became the first in India to meet its entire power demand through solar energy, as of 2025?
Which edition of the BIMSTEC Summit in Thailand did the Indian Prime Minister attend on 4 April 2025?
When did Donald Trump officially take office as the 47ᵗʰ President of the United States?
In February 2025, a self-cleaning, flexible heating fabric was developed by ___________.
Which Indian sprinter made a successful comeback by winning a silver medal in the women's 4×100m relay at the 2025 Asian Athletics Championships?
Dr. Justice DY Chandrachud, former Chief Justice of India, joined which of the following institutions in May 2025 as a distinguished professor?
questions.option_1: Faculty of Law, University of Delhi (DU)

questions.question: The Government conducted a crocodile census in the Vishwamitri River to estimate the population of mugger crocodiles. In which state is the Vishwamitri River located?
Which Latin American country became the first to pull out of China's Belt and Road Initiative in February 2025?
What significant milestone did Pixxel achieve with its 2025 space launch?
questions.option_2: Launch of the first private satellite constellation from India
questions.option_3: Construction of a domestic space observatory
questions.option_4: India’s first lunar lander by a startup

questions.question: Which of the following institutes proposed development of world’s smallest semiconductors chip in 2025?
The Women’s Kabaddi World Cup scheduled for June 2025, was announced to be hosted in which location in India?
On 25 April 2025, DRDO achieved a significant milestone by conducting a long-duration ground test of an active cooled scramjet subscale combustor. How long did this test last?
The 12ᵗʰ edition of the Global Terrorism Report Index (GTI) 2025 was published by _____.
questions.option_1: The Institute of Economic and Peace
questions.option_2: The United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime
questions.option_3: The United Nations Office to Counter Terrorism

questions.question: According to the Waqf (Amendment) Bill, 2025, within how many days can an appeal be made in the High Court on the order of the Waqf Tribunal?
Who introduced the Railways (Amendment) Bill that was passed in the Rajya Sabha in March 2025?
Who was honoured with the Padma Bhushan in 2025 for their contributions to Indian cinema?
The Union Territories Laws (Amendment) Bill, which was introduced in the Lok Sabha on 17 December 2024, amends how many Acts?
How many Khelo India centres did the Delhi government propose to establish in June 2025?
What is 'Google Beam' introduced under Project Starline?
questions.option_1: An AI-powered video communication platform aiming to redefine virtual interactions
questions.option_2: A hardware device for enhancing internet speed in rural areas
questions.option_3: A new satellite launched by Google for global internet coverage
questions.option_4: A language translation tool for real-time communication
